title: WebSocket/Beacon/EventSource Domain Interception
overview: Close the last network interception gap vs agent-browser. Currently DomainFilter blocks HTTP requests via Playwright's context.route(), but WebSocket connections, navigator.sendBeacon(), and EventSource bypass the filter. Fix by injecting a JS init script that wraps these APIs with domain checks.
scopeChallenge: DomainFilter already handles URL validation and HTTP blocking via Playwright route(). JS-level APIs (WebSocket, sendBeacon, EventSource) bypass this. CDP-level Fetch interception was ruled out — breaks Playwright abstraction. JS injection via addInitScript is simpler and covers all three APIs.

failureModes.risk: Page overrides WebSocket after our wrapper
failureModes.mitigation: Use Object.defineProperty with configurable: false to lock the wrapper

failureModes.risk: Init script runs after page JS (race)
failureModes.mitigation: addInitScript runs before any page JS by design (Playwright guarantee)

failureModes.risk: Allowed WebSocket connections break due to wrapper
failureModes.mitigation: Wrapper must call original constructor with all args for allowed domains

failureModes.risk: Init script lost on context recreation
failureModes.mitigation: Store script on BrowserManager, re-apply in recreateContext

tasks.title: Add generateInitScript() to DomainFilter and apply in SessionManager
tasks.description: Add a method to DomainFilter that returns a JS string wrapping WebSocket, EventSource, and navigator.sendBeacon with domain checks. Apply via context.addInitScript() in session-manager.ts. The generated JS must replicate isAllowed() logic in pure browser JS. Wrap original constructors, check URL domain, throw Error if blocked. Pass allowed domains as JSON array embedded in script string.
acceptanceCriteria: generateInitScript() returns valid JS that wraps WebSocket, EventSource, and sendBeacon
Allowed domains pass through (WebSocket to allowed host connects normally)
Blocked domains throw an Error with a message containing the blocked hostname

tasks.title: Add integration tests for WebSocket/Beacon/EventSource interception
tasks.description: Create test fixture and integration tests verifying domain filter blocks WebSocket, EventSource, and sendBeacon to disallowed domains while allowing them to allowed domains. Use page.evaluate() to verify wrappers throw for blocked domains.
acceptanceCriteria: WebSocket to blocked domain throws error (caught in page.evaluate)
sendBeacon to blocked domain returns false or throws
EventSource to blocked domain throws error
WebSocket to allowed domain does NOT throw (constructor succeeds)

tasks.title: Preserve init script across context recreation
tasks.description: Ensure recreateContext() re-applies the domain filter init script to the new context. Store script string on BrowserManager, call addInitScript() on new context in recreateContext(). Call manager.setInitScript(script) in session-manager.ts when setting up domain filter.
acceptanceCriteria: After emulate device with domain filter active, WebSocket to blocked domain still throws
After useragent change with domain filter active, init script still applied
Without domain filter, no init script is injected (no overhead)
